bm25_text: SR 19-10 / CA 19-9 CA 19-9: Final Rule Revising the Board’s Delegation Rules for Certain Types of Applications, Notices, and Requests The procedures in the final rule apply to certain applications, notices, and requests submitted to the Federal Reserve by supervised financial institutions and other entities.1 BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF SUPERVISION AND REGULATION DIVISION OF CONSUMERAND COMMUNITY AFFAIRS TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT:
